title: COMMUNITY CHILD CARE INITIATIVE - 211info
text: MT HOOD COMMUNITY COLLEGE CHILD CARE RESOURCE AND REFERRAL COMMUNITY CHILD CARE INITIATIVE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers families and child care providers the opportunity to receive financial assistance for child care. Acceptance into the program is dependent on family eligibility and program funding. 4510 NE 102nd Avenue Portland, OR 97220 Eligibility: Families with incomes up to 80% of Portland’s median who have applied for ERDC may qualify for Community Child Care Initiative (CCI) assistance. Families must live in Portland, and parents must be working (both parents in two-parent families). Foster families without ERDC may also be eligible. Priority is given to children ages 0–3, families with multiple children, and children with special needs. Child care providers must meet separate eligibility requirements. Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm Email (503) 491-6205 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 491-6205 FAX (503) 491-6930 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or email to request an application or with questions. Completed applications can be submitted by appointment in person, by mail or fax, or by email. Incomplete applications will be returned. FEES: This is a subsidy program. Participating families pay no more than 8% of their gross annual income for child care costs. DOCUMENTS: Completed application and 3 months proof of income. If not receiving ERDC, include a copy of the denial letter verifying over-income or on the reservation list. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Russian, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: City of Portland Services: Child Care Expense Assistance Child Care Expense Assistance * Foster Families Other Services Offered At This Location: PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - BABY PROMISE PUBLIC SAFETY - CHILD CARE RESOURCE AND REFERRAL If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MT HOOD COMMUNITY COLLEGE CHILD CARE RESOURCE AND REFERRAL
